Headline: #14 Jeffery Jump & #15 Jeffery Local Temporary Northbound Reroute near Jeffrey/ 73rd
ShortDescription: Northbound 14 Jeffery Jump & 15 Jeffery Local buses are temp. rerouted via Jeffery, 73rd, Yates, 71st and Jeffery: due to street blockage near Jeffrey/73rd.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How will this affect my trip?

 

Northbound #14 Jeffery Jump & #15 Jeffery Local buses are temporarily rerouted via Jeffery, 73rd, Yates, 71st, Jeffery and over regular route: due to street blockage near Jeffrey/73rd.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
